message:
style(engine): remove dead code, unused imports, and use struct init syntax in RGC modules

Remove unused hex_encode helper, PathBuf import, and MILLION constant
from kernelized_shift_guard. Remove unused imports from rough-path
regime geometry integration tests. Convert mutable-field-assignment
patterns to struct init syntax with ..default().

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
